hero.headline: Four Decades of Backyard Dreams Built Right
hero.subheadline: Since 1982, the DesRochers family has been turning backyards across Northern Illinois into private retreats. From award-winning pool construction to weekly maintenance and hot tub sales, we handle everything so you can enjoy the fun.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs,<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it crystal clear year-round, DesRochers is your single source for everything backyard. Three locations, one family, total peace of mind.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Award-winning fiberglass and vinyl liner inground pools custom-designed for your backyard. Nationally recognized craftsmanship with over four decades of building excellence.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Authorized Caldera and Fantasy Spas dealer with hot tubs in stock at our Wilmington and Shorewood showrooms. Expert guidance to find your perfect backyard escape.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly cleaning, water chemistry balancing, equipment checks, and seasonal care. Our experienced technicians keep your pool swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Openings & Closings
cards.description: Professional seasonal pool opening and winterization services. Our crew ensures your pool is ready for summer fun or properly protected through the Illinois winter.

cards.title: Fiberglass Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert fiberglass restoration that fixes major damage and makes your pool look brand new. Backed by decades of specialized repair experience.

cards.title: Pool Supplies & Water Testing
cards.description: Full-service retail stores stocked with chemicals, equipment, and accessories. Free water testing and personalized chemical recommendations from our knowledgeable staff.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Visit any of our three locations or call for a free consultation. Share your backyard dreams, budget, and timeline, and we'll create a personalized plan just for you.

steps.title: We Bring It to Life
steps.description: Our award-winning team handles every detail from design to construction, with Brian DesRochers personally overseeing your project. You'll stay informed at every step.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard paradise is ready. And with our ongoing maintenance services and retail stores, we'll keep it looking perfect for generations of family fun.

about.label: Why Northern Illinois Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats You Like Family
about.description: DesRochers Backyard Pools & Spas has been a family-owned cornerstone of Will County since 1982. With three locations in Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris, our team has earned national awards for construction quality and a reputation for going above and beyond. Brian DesRochers personally oversees projects because we believe every pool deserves the same care we'd put into our own backyard.

features.title: 44 Years of Family Expertise
features.description: Three generations of pool knowledge passed down since 1982. Our longevity means we've seen it all and solved it all.

features.title: Three Convenient Locations
features.description: Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris showrooms with hot tubs in stock, full retail supplies, and expert staff ready to help.

features.title: Owner-Involved on Every Project
features.description: Brian DesRochers personally oversees construction and major repairs. You're not just a number here — you're part of our extended family.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: From a bag of chlorine to a full pool build, we give you honest pricing upfront. Stop by any location or call for a free estimate.

guarantee.headline: Our "Backyard Happiness" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely thrilled with our work, we'll make it right at no extra cost. That's the promise the DesRochers family has kept for over 44 years and thousands of happy pool owners across Northern Illinois.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Most inground pool projects take 6-10 weeks from permit to first splash, depending on complexity and weather. Fiberglass pools can be installed faster. We'll give you a detailed timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated throughout.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service all pool types regardless of who built them. In fact, many of our happiest customers came to us after problems with other builders. We'll treat your pool like our own no matter what.

faqs.question: Which of your three locations should I visit?
faqs.answer: Whichever is most convenient! Our Wilmington, Shorewood, and Morris locations all carry chemicals, supplies, and hot tubs. Each has knowledgeable staff who can test your water for free and recommend the right products.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for pool construction?
faqs.answer: Yes, we work with several financing partners to help make your dream pool affordable. During your consultation, we'll walk you through available options so you can find a payment plan that fits your budget.

faqs.question: What hot tub brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized dealer for Caldera Spas and Fantasy Spas, two of the most trusted names in the industry. Visit our Wilmington or Shorewood showrooms to see models in stock and find the perfect fit for your backyard.

testimonials.name: J. K.
testimonials.text: This was by far the best experience anyone could have. Brian kept us informed throughout the entire project. The crew was professional and respectful of our property. We couldn't be happier with our new pool.

testimonials.name: Jim K.
testimonials.text: DesRochers didn't only fix the major mistakes another company made, they made it look brand new. Their expertise with fiberglass is unmatched. I wish we had gone to them first.

testimonials.name: Leo R.
testimonials.text: Still impressed with the level of service this company provides after 10 years. Always friendly, always professional, and they stand behind their work. A true family business that treats you like family.

Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free consultation from Northern Illinois' most trusted pool builder. Visit any of our three locations or call today — the DesRochers family is ready to help.
